verses.text: Pasian aw, keimah hong honkhia nuam in. Topa aw, keimah a huh dingin hong manlang in
Kei, thah hong sawmte maizumin kibuaigawp sak in. Keima siatna ding a deihte nungkiksak in la, mindaisak in
“Ha, ha!” a cite a maizumna uh tawh maikhingsak in
Nang hong zongte khempeuh lungdam mahmahin na min hangin kipak ta hen. Na hotkhiat ding a utte in, “Pasian lian hi,” cici ta hen
Ahih hangin kei zawngin ka cimawh hi. Pasian aw, hong manlang in. Nang pen keimah huhpa leh hong honkhiapa na hi hi. Topa aw, hong zekai kei in.
